function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'printf' to reach function 'main'?

dominators: Does the statement line 6:  <statement> int i; </statement> dominate line 3:  <statement> int main() { </statement>?

data_dependency: Does the value of variable i at line 10: <statement>     for(i=0; i<6; i++) { </statement> depend on the value of variable b at line 5: <statement>     int b[N]; </statement>?
liveness: Does variable 'i' remain in use at the end of function 'main'?
